title: BoostCrystal
description: Boost yourself along the entire world
body:
# Yeet yourself around the entire world

### This Mods add a new Item the Boost Crystal. 

The Boost Crystal can crafted be with Glass, an Eye of Ender and one Echoshard:
[![name](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZYHpSFQu/images/0e8333fb2845de6d6391afe9bf28bd9bc667c1ac.png)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZYHpSFQu/images/0e8333fb2845de6d6391afe9bf28bd9bc667c1ac.png)

The Boost Crystal does regenerate after **3** Seconds and does not deal damage.

It gives **3 times** greater Knockback if compared to the end crystal.


***The Knockback (as multiplier) and Cooldown (in ticks) are both fully configurable.**
